communications.subject: New Jersey Open Public Records Act Request: 1967 Homicide of Nancy Vogel
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New Jersey Open Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting access to and copies of records related to the investigation of the homicide of Nancy Vogel which occurred on or about 10/27/67. Her body was found in Ridgefield Park, NJ.

Specifically, I am seeking the following:

The autopsy report and medical examiner’s findings, including any supplemental or toxicology reports.

Any arrest reports, charging documents, indictments, or plea agreements pertaining to Richard Cottingham

If any portions of these records are exempt from disclosure, please release all reasonably segregable non-exempt portions.

Please inform me if the scope of this request needs narrowing or clarification to facilitate processing.

Thank you,
Dawn Gandhi

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Dawn Gandhi
